mapper.sql: id, user_id, rel_name, id_type, id_number, create_time, edit_time, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM d_ticket_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_ticket_user (user_id, rel_name, id_type, id_number, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{relName}, #{idType}, #{idNumber}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})
